title: Design System: Dashboard Operasional Rumah Pandega

display.purpose: Metric values on KPI cards. The loudest typographic element on any data screen.

headline.purpose: Section page titles (e.g. 'Ringkasan Eksekutif'). One per page.

title.purpose: Chart and sub-section headers. Paired with an Ink Tertiary subtitle line.

body.purpose: Sidebar nav labels, table content, general UI copy.

label.purpose: KPI card sub-labels, tag text, field labels.

micro.purpose: Sidebar navigation section dividers only. Prohibited as eyebrow text on main content surface.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: State transitions: hover background, focus border, active nav state. Duration 150ms.

components.name: KPI Card
components.description: The primary data display unit. One metric, one color strip, one sparkline. Four per page row.
components.html:
Pendapatan Periode
Rp 48,2 Jt
Beban Rp 21,5 Jt
▲ 12.4% vs sblm
components.css: .ds-kpi-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E8EDF3; border-radius: 16px; padding: 0 0 12px; overflow: hidden; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-kpi-strip { height: 4px; border-radius: 16px 16px 0 0; } .ds-kpi-body { padding: 14px 20px 0; } .ds-kpi-label { font-size: 12px; color: #64748B; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-kpi-value { font-size: 24px; color: #0F172A; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.5px; line-height: 1.1; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-kpi-sub { font-size: 11px; color: #64748B; } .ds-kpi-sub.pos { color: #16A34A; font-weight: 600; } .ds-kpi-sub.neg { color: #DC2626; font-weight: 600; } .ds-kpi-sub.warn { color: #D97706; font-weight: 600; } .ds-kpi-delta { font-size: 10px; color: #16A34A; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-kpi-delta.neg { color: #DC2626; }

components.name: Chart Header
components.description: White header above every Plotly chart. Accent via border-top (not border-left — see The No-Stripe Rule).
components.html:
Tren Pendapatan vs Biaya

Bulanan · Rp Juta · 01 Jan – 15 Jun 2026
components.css: .ds-chart-header { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E8EDF3; border-radius: 16px 16px 0 0; border-bottom: none; padding: 14px 20px 10px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-accent-executive { border-top: 3px solid #4F46E5; } .ds-accent-sales { border-top: 3px solid #059669; } .ds-accent-admin { border-top: 3px solid #2563EB; } .ds-accent-marketing { border-top: 3px solid #7C3AED; } .ds-accent-ops { border-top: 3px solid #EA580C; } .ds-chart-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #0F172A; margin: 0 0 2px; } .ds-chart-sub { font-size: 11px; color: #94A3B8; margin: 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Dark navy sidebar. Five role nav items. Active state: Slate Surface background + role accent left-border (sole permitted content left-border).
components.html:
NAVIGASI

📊 Executive 🎯 Sales 🏠 Admin 📣 Marketing 🔧 Operasional
components.css: .ds-sidebar { background: #0F172A; padding: 8px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-section-lbl { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 6px 4px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 13px; color: #94A3B8; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; border-left: 3px solid transparent; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #1E293B; color: #CBD5E1; } .ds-nav-active { background: #1E293B !important; color: #FFFFFF !important; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Page Header
components.description: Top-of-page section header. Role emoji + title + subtitle with period badge + 48px accent bar.
components.html:
📊 Ringkasan Eksekutif

Kinerja portofolio kost · BOD / Owner · 📅 01 Jan – 15 Jun 2026
components.css: .ds-page-header { margin: 0 0 24px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-page-title { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #0F172A; margin: 0 0 4px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-page-sub { font-size: 13px; color: #64748B; margin: 0; } .ds-accent-bar { height: 3px; width: 48px; border-radius: 99px; margin-top: 10px; } .ds-period-badge { display: inline-block; background: #F1F5F9; color: #475569; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 99px; font-size: 11px; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; margin-left: 4px; vertical-align: middle; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Used only for form submit (login) and sidebar Refresh. Executive Indigo always, regardless of active role page.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #4F46E5; color: #FFFFFF; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4338CA; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4F46E5; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #3730A3; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Login form and any future filter inputs. Focus ring uses Executive Indigo only.
components.css: .ds-input-group { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-input-label { display: block; color: #374151; font-weight: 500; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-input-text { background: #F8FAFC; color: #0F172A; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.15s; font-family: inherit; } .ds-input-text:focus { border-color: #4F46E5; outline: none; box-shadow: none; } .ds-input-text::placeholder { color: #94A3B8; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Shown whenever a data section has zero records for the selected period. Matter-of-fact, not apologetic.
components.html:
📭
Belum ada data pada periode ini.
components.css: .ds-empty-state { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E8EDF3; border-radius: 16px; padding: 40px 20px; text-align: center; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-empty-icon { font-size: 32px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-empty-text { color: #94A3B8; font-size: 13px; }

components.name: Period Badge
components.description: Inline pill showing the active date range. Always in page subtitle. Part of the data contract.
components.css: .ds-period-badge { display: inline-block; background: #F1F5F9; color: #475569; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 99px; font-size: 11px; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; vertical-align: middle; }

narrative.overview:
This is a dual-register system. The left panel is the cockpit: pitch dark, authoritative, role-aware. The right surface is the working floor: cool, clean, every number given space to breathe. You know where you are in the hierarchy the instant the page loads — the contrast between sidebar and content is not a styling choice, it's a structural signal.

Five roles operate this dashboard. Each has its own accent channel — indigo for Executive, emerald for Sales, blue for Admin, violet for Marketing, orange for Operasional — and that channel fires only as a signal: the top strip of a KPI card, the color of a chart line, the active state of a nav item. Everywhere else, the palette holds discipline. Rarity is what makes the signal meaningful.

The system rejects two failure modes: the korporat kaku aesthetic of legacy BI tools (heavy chrome, gray gradients, zero personality) and the generic SaaS template (off-the-shelf card grid, tracked eyebrow above every section, indistinguishable from any other dashboard). This dashboard was built for one team, for one business. It should feel exactly that way.
keyCharacteristics: Dark command sidebar (Slate Cockpit #0F172A) anchors every screen
Cool neutral working surface (Ghost Surface #F1F5F9) with white card elevation
Five role-specific accent channels; cross-contamination prohibited
Flat depth model: background tonal steps replace shadows entirely
KPI value (24px/700) is the loudest typographic element on any screen
System font only; no decorative type choices

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Role accent colors appear in exactly three contexts: (1) the 4px top strip of KPI cards, (2) chart line/bar/fill colors, (3) the left-border active indicator in sidebar navigation. Nowhere else.

rules.name: The Five-Channel Rule
rules.body: Cross-contamination between role channels is prohibited. The accent the eye sees tells the user which context they're in — mixing channels destroys that signal.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows are prohibited at all states. Depth is expressed through background tonal steps and 1px borders only.

rules.name: The Number-First Rule
rules.body: The KPI Display value (24px/700) is the loudest element on any data screen. Nothing competes with it.

rules.name: The Micro-Only Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked type (Micro style) is permitted only as sidebar navigation section dividers. Prohibited as eyebrow/kicker text above any main-surface content section.

rules.name: The No-Stripe Rule
rules.body: border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent is prohibited on content containers. The sidebar nav active left-border is the sole exception.

dos: Do use role accent colors exclusively for KPI card top strips, chart lines/fills, and sidebar nav active indicators on that role's page.
Do maintain the three-layer depth hierarchy: Command Depth sidebar → Ghost Surface main → Card White cards.
Do make KPI display values (24px/700) the loudest element on every data screen.
Do use border-top (not border-left) on chart headers when an accent indicator is needed.
Do use the period badge consistently in every page subtitle.
Do maintain WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1) for all body text, labels, and placeholder text.
Do use empty state components whenever a data section has zero records.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on any content card, chart header, callout, or data row.
Don't feel like SAP or Oracle — no heavy gray gradients, no multi-level chrome, no enterprise-gray color schemes.
Don't feel like a generic SaaS template — no identical icon+heading+text card grid, no uppercase tracked eyebrow above content sections.
Don't use role accent colors as full card backgrounds or section backgrounds in the main content area.
Don't add gradient text (background-clip: text). Display values are solid #0F172A.
Don't mix role accent channels between pages.
Don't use Micro style as eyebrow/kicker text above any main-surface content section.
Don't add glassmorphism, hero-metric templates, or identical card grids.
